name: neurowell
description: NeuroWell — multimodal AI mental health chatbot

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && pip install -r ai/deepface/requirements.txt && pip install -r ai/albert/requirements.txt && pip install -r ai/rag/requirements.txt
scripts.start: concurrently -n client,server,deepface,albert -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run start --prefix client" "npm run start --prefix server" "python ai/deepface/app.py" "python ai/albert/app.py"
